CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, name String, continent_id UInt32);
CREATE TABLE continents (id UInt32, name String);
INSERT INTO regions VALUES (10, 'North Africa', 1), (20, 'West Asia', 2), (30, 'Western Europe', 3);
SELECT regionToTopContinent(id) AS top_continent FROM regions WHERE id = 10;
SELECT regionToTopContinent(id) AS top_continent FROM regions WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM regions);
SELECT r.id, r.name, regionToTopContinent(r.id) AS top_continent FROM regions r JOIN continents c ON r.continent_id = c.id WHERE c.name = 'Africa';
SELECT regionToTopContinent(id) AS top_continent FROM regions ORDER BY top_continent DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT r.id, regionToName(r.id, 'en') AS region_name, regionToTopContinent(r.id) AS top_continent FROM regions r WHERE r.id IN (SELECT id FROM regions WHERE continent_id = (SELECT id FROM continents WHERE name = 'Europe'));
SELECT r.id, regionToName(r.id, 'en') AS region_name, regionToTopContinent(r.id) AS top_continent FROM regions r WHERE r.continent_id = (SELECT id FROM continents WHERE name = 'Asia');
CREATE DICTIONARY test_dict (id UInt32, name String) PRIMARY KEY id;
INSERT INTO test_dict VALUES (1, 'Test Region 1'), (2, 'Test Region 2');
SELECT regionToTopContinent(id, 'test_dict') AS top_continent FROM test_dict;
SELECT regionToTopContinent(id) AS top_continent FROM (SELECT id FROM regions WHERE continent_id IS NOT NULL);
SELECT regionToTopContinent(id) AS top_continent FROM (SELECT id FROM regions ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5) AS subquery;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE regionToTopContinent(id) = 0;
SELECT r.id, regionToName(r.id, 'en') AS region_name, regionToTopContinent(r.id) AS top_continent FROM regions r WHERE regionToTopContinent(r.id) IN (1, 2) ORDER BY r.id;
SELECT r.id, regionToTopContinent(r.id) AS top_continent FROM regions r WHERE r.id BETWEEN 1 AND 30;
SELECT r.id FROM regions r WHERE regionToTopContinent(r.id) <> 0 ORDER BY r.id DESC;
